title: Pyrrosia spissa
intro: Pyrrosia spissa, also known as Spiny Pyrrosia, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Pyrrosia spissa include sesquiterpenoids and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Pyrrosia spissa is commonly prepared as a tea or decoction, and is also used in the production of capsules and tablets to support joint health and immune function.
taxonomy: Pyrrosia spissa is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a member of the genus Pyrrosia, which includes about 60 species of terrestrial ferns. The genus Pyrrosia is part of the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the polypody ferns. The family Polypodiaceae is a group of ferns that are primarily epiphytic or terrestrial. Pyrrosia spissa is classified as a type of vascular plant, belonging to the division Pteridophyta.
